mapper.select: SELECT b.*, m.mem_name, bs.bid_status_name AS bidStatusName FROM bid b JOIN member m ON b.bidder_idx = m.mem_idx JOIN bid_status bs ON b.bid_status_idx = bs.bid_status_idx WHERE b.auction_idx = #{auctionIdx} ORDER BY b.bid_regdate DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bid ( auction_idx, bidder_idx, item_idx, bid_price, bid_quantity, bid_message, bid_status_idx, bid_regdate ) VALUES ( #{auctionIdx}, #{bidderIdx}, #{itemIdx}, #{bidPrice}, #{bidQuantity}, #{bidMessage}, 1, NOW() )
